title: 2026-02-12 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 6.71
description: Daily pressure check for 2026-02-12: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 6.71/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2026-02-12, the score printed 6.71/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
